mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE ip_address IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(ip_address, ':') != 1

SELECT trust_id AS trustId, ip_address AS ipAddress FROM USER_TRUSTED_IPS WHERE ip_address IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(ip_address, ':') != 1 ORDER BY trust_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
